response.global_analysis: The video features two musical performances separated by a brief investigation scene. The first song, 'M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE SHOT!', is performed in English; I transcribed the audio directly as the provided JSON reference contained the Japanese version. The second song, 'Enka (炎夏)', follows the JSON reference for the first verse but features lyrical variations in the second half which I transcribed from the audio (e.g., 'koe' changing to 'enka'). Dialogue at the 01:00 mark was also captured. Timestamps are precisely aligned with the vocal audio cues.

subtitles.original: Wait, so you're saying I've got to be brave?
subtitles.english: Wait, so you're saying I've got to be brave?

subtitles.original: As long as you can stay happy, I'm okay
subtitles.english: As long as you can stay happy, I'm okay

subtitles.original: I'm not gonna bend, ha!
I can be a cure for kissing your heart away
subtitles.english: I can be a cure for kissing your heart away

subtitles.original: And I'll play and I'll sing you a whole new way
subtitles.english: And I'll play and I'll sing you a whole new way

subtitles.original: Your smile is enough to heal all my pain
subtitles.english: Your smile is enough to heal all my pain

subtitles.original: So M-A-G-I-C-A-L Love Shot!
If you're feeling pain call my name I'll be by your side
subtitles.english: If you're feeling pain call my name I'll be by your side

subtitles.original: Till I see your smile beam bright again
subtitles.english: Till I see your smile beam bright again

subtitles.original: Urya oi! Urya oi!
1-2-3-4 Powerful Mikucchan!
Urya oi! Urya oi!
Cyber Miku-miku go!
あー、眠いよ...
夢... だった？
知った、救いのない形だった
subtitles.english: Understood, it was a form without salvation,

subtitles.original: 僕の聲は
散った、狂いのない
赤い血が流れているんだ
ただただ襲い来る影ばかり満ちて
subtitles.english: Only shadows are filling, coming to attack me.

subtitles.original: 抗う言葉も、立ち上がれない夜風
subtitles.english: Facing words I can't resist, the wind that won't lift.

subtitles.original: 赤く光る場所へ、走り出したら
subtitles.english: I left for a place that shines red,

subtitles.original: ただ膝を抱えている君がいた
subtitles.english: and there you were, just holding your knees.

subtitles.original: だからENCOUNT、悲劇、決まった、天国へ
subtitles.english: That's why an encounter, a tragedy, decided, to heaven.

subtitles.original: 不甲斐ない瞳きっとあの日、見つめた
subtitles.english: Eyes that don't reflect, surely that day, I was staring at them.

subtitles.original: 君のせいは、早く、早く、早く、早く…
subtitles.english: The days that followed, hurry, hurry, hurry, hurry...

subtitles.original: 身を揺らして
淡い、淡い、水面の向こうと
subtitles.english: Faint, faint, beyond the water's surface...

subtitles.original: 知った、
救いのない熱を持った僕の炎夏
subtitles.english: my flaming summer that held a heat without salvation.

subtitles.original: 散った、
狂いのない貴方の瞳は醜かった
酷く、酷く、酷く...
ぼう線としてるその顔に
触れて
見たかった
だからENCOUNT、悲劇、決まった、天国へ
subtitles.english: That's why an encounter, a tragedy, decided, to heaven.
